emails.subject: book request
emails.body: Susan, Could I please get a copy of a blank book request from you. Thanks Kam

emails.subject: RE: book request
emails.body: RE: book request Kam sorry for the late response but I was on vacation yesterday. Attached is a blank book request form. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks, Susan x3-1462 To: Trevino, Susan

emails.subject: RE: book request
emails.body: Thanks, Chris was able to get me a copy of that yesterday. KK To: Keiser, Kam
